properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v1 v5 v6 v7 v7 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11 v12 v13 v1 v14

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm caught up in Your presence I just want to sit here at Your feet I'm caught up in this holy moment I never want to leave

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh, I'm not here for blessing Jesus, You don't owe me anything More than anything that You can do I just want You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I'm sorry when I've just gone through the motions I'm sorry when I just sang another song Take me back to where we started I open up my heart to You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I'm sorry when I've come with my agenda I'm sorry when I forgot that You're enough Take me back to where we started I open up my heart to You

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh, I'm not here for blessings Jesus, You don't owe me anything More than anything that You can do I just want You

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I just want You Nothing else, nothing else Nothing else will do I just want You

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Nothing else, nothing else Nothing else will do I just want You

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Nothing else, no nothing else Nothing else will do I just want You

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Nothing else, nothing else Nothing else will do I just want You I just want You

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Nothing else will do Nothing else will do I don't want anything else what You don't I don't want anything else that You have I don't want anything else but You Jesus Ohh

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: I'm coming back to the heart of worship I'm coming back to where it's all about Just You Jesus, just You Jesus Take all the stuff I don't care I don't want it Just You Jesus is all above Just You more is all above Oh, Jesus, Jesus, Jesus

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: Oh, could there be anything else But Your presence, but Your heart Nothing else matters, nothing else matter Nothing else I do, I just worship You Jesus

verse.name: v13
verse.lines: I'm sorry when I've come with my agenda I'm sorry when I forgot, you're enough Jesus, you're enough I remember now I remember now You're enough

verse.name: v14
verse.lines: Oh, I'm not here for blessings Jesus, You don't owe me anything More than anything that You can do Oh, I just want You
